name: BT Group
summary: BT Group is a major UK telecommunications and digital services company, with roots tracing back to the Electric Telegraph Company in 1846. It provides broadband, mobile, fixed-line, TV, cyber security, networking and managed services to consumers, businesses and public-sector organisations. BT Group includes key UK brands and divisions such as BT, EE and Openreach, and describes its wider purpose as helping people and organisations connect securely in a digital world.
